description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular display panel mounted atop two tall, rusted metal support columns. The panel is bordered by a thick, weathered metal frame and displays a printed advertisement with the text 'Fabrik limited' and 'New World' in a stylized font, along with some partially obscured words above. The support columns are constructed from the same rusted metal and have a ladder-like structure on their inner sides, adding to the industrial aesthetic. The entire object has a heavily corroded, reddish-brown patina, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The board is freestanding and designed to be highly visible in an urban environment, likely placed at street level for maximum pedestrian or vehicular visibility. No visible illumination features are present, and the design is utilitarian with a focus on durability and stability.
description: A rusted metal advertising board with a rectangular display panel atop two tall, ladder-like support columns, featuring printed text and an industrial, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full display panel with visible printed advertisement and both rusted support columns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the display panel and the ladder-like structure of the support columns.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the back of the display panel and support columns visible, but advertisement text is less legible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the open, ladder-like design of the columns.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding, supported by two metal columns embedded in ground
attribute_frame_design: thick rusted metal border with rectangular shape and industrial ladder-like supports
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement for 'Fabrik limited' and 'New World' with stylized text
